entities.name: RFI-001

entities.name: RFI-005
entities.description: RFI noting Generator G-12 factory acceptance testing is complete and site delivery remains scheduled for 18 July.

entities.name: RFI-009
entities.description: RFI stating Contractor Omega owns the raised-floor installation package.

entities.name: RFI-010

entities.name: RFI-013

entities.name: RFI-016

entities.name: RFI-017

entities.name: RFI-018

entities.name: RFI-020

recommendations.title: Expedite delayed activity
recommendations.description: Request a vendor recovery plan within 24 hours. The reported 5-day delay currently creates 5 days of critical-path exposure. Track recovery milestones daily.

recommendations.title: Review project schedule
recommendations.description: Rebaseline 2 downstream activities and issue the 5-day completion forecast to planning and commissioning.

recommendations.title: Notify impacted teams
recommendations.description: Issue schedule revisions to owners of: Data Hall A, Electrical Room Fitout. Complete notification before the earliest forecast start date.

recommendations.title: Resequence critical-path work
recommendations.description: The current forecast shows 5 days of critical-path slippage. Parallel testing preparation and commissioning readiness could recover approximately 2 days; validate this scenario with the project scheduler.
